recent_adjustments: Generate a list of 12 distinct "ink strokes" each with a defined memory loss (e.g., lose childhood name, forget first love).
Create a procedural echo‑phage table that converts any spoken line into a hostile entity unless the line contains a pre‑registered forgotten word.
Link the veil's expansion rate to the cumulative memory loss metric; as agents lose more, the veil spreads faster.
Set a flag for the next book (Book 19) to trigger the "Fracture" stage by introducing a rogue echo‑phage that hijacks the veil's ink.
